memory_entries.text: Product DB schema discovery: electronics dataset is group g2 (items_g2, taxn_g2, fdbk_g2). items_g2 columns include ref_id, ttl, avg_rtg, prc INTEGER, prc_usd REAL, str_nm, main_cat, feat_lst, img_ct. taxn_g2 has ref_id, cat_lvl, cat_nm; 'Computers & Accessories' appears as top-level cat_lvl=1. Use prc_usd for product price in electronics.
